name: Aha! Product Roadmap API
what_it_does: Aha! product management platform REST API for product managers to build strategy, create roadmaps, manage features, track releases, and prioritize ideas with OKR alignment and competitive intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage product strategy and goal creation for product vision automation, handle roadmap item and feature management for planning workflow automation, access idea portal and voting management for customer feedback automation, retrieve release and sprint planning for delivery coordination automation, manage initiative and epic hierarchy for strategic planning automation, handle custom scorecard and prioritization for feature ranking automation, access competitive intelligence and persona management for market context automation, retrieve integration with Jira for engineering handoff automation, manage notebook and presentation creation for stakeholder communication automation, and integrate Aha! with Jira, GitHub, Azure DevOps, Salesforce, and development tools for end-to-end product management workflow.
use_cases: Building product roadmaps from strategic planning automation agents
Prioritizing features from scoring and OKR alignment agents
Managing idea portals from customer feedback aggregation agents
Coordinating releases from product-to-engineering handoff agents
not_for: Engineering task management (use Jira or Linear for dev-side tracking)
Simple kanban boards (use Trello or Notion for lightweight planning)
Customer support ticket management (use Zendesk or Freshdesk)
best_when: A product management team wanting AI agents to automate roadmap planning, feature prioritization, idea portal management, and Jira engineering handoff through Aha!'s comprehensive product management platform.
avoid_when: AHA WORKSPACE HIERARCHY IS COMPLEX FOR AUTOMATED NAVIGATION: Aha! organizes products in Accounts → Workspaces → Products → Releases → Features → Requirements; automated product management must maintain correct hierarchy context for all operations; automated feature creation without correct workspace context creates feature in wrong product line. CUSTOM SCORECARD WEIGHTS FOR AUTOMATED PRIORITIZATION: Aha! scorecards use custom fields and weighted formulas for feature scoring; automated prioritization using Aha! scores must retrieve current scorecard configuration; automated prioritization assuming fixed score formula breaks when product team changes scorecard weights. IDEA PORTAL CUSTOMER DATA AND GDPR: Aha! idea portals collect customer-submitted ideas with personal data; automated idea processing pipeline must handle GDPR compliance for EU customer data; automated idea data export for analysis must comply with data retention and deletion policies.

auth.notes: Aha! uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. Menlo Park, California HQ. Founded 2013 by Brian de Haaff and Dr. Chris Waters. Bootstrapped/profitable ($100M+ ARR). Products: Roadmaps, Ideas portal, Notebooks, Whiteboards, Develop (agile). Integrations: Jira, GitHub, Azure DevOps, Salesforce, Zendesk, Slack. GDPR. SOC2. Serves 700,000+ product builders at 6,000+ companies. Competes with Productboard, Roadmunk, and ProdPad for product management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Roadmaps ($59/user/mo), Ideas ($39/user/mo), Develop ($9/user/mo), Enterprise (custom); annual discount
pricing.notes: Menlo Park CA. Bootstrapped/profitable. Per-user subscription. 30-day trial. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key (100-400 req/min depending on endpoint); feature and idea queries throttled; webhooks for feature, release, and idea events

known_agent_gotchas: WORKSPACE SLUG vs NUMERIC ID FOR API REQUESTS: Aha! API uses both workspace slug (URL-friendly name) and numeric ID; some endpoints accept slug, others require numeric ID; automated workflow must maintain mapping between workspace slug and numeric ID; automated requests using slug on numeric-ID endpoints creates 404 for valid workspace

CUSTOM FIELD VALUE FORMAT BY FIELD TYPE: Aha! custom fields support text, number, date, dropdown, multi-select, and URL types; automated feature creation with custom fields must format value correctly per field type; automated custom field population using wrong format creates field validation error without clear field type hint in error message

RELEASE DATE vs TARGET DATE DISTINCTION: Aha! features have both release date (associated release milestone) and target date (feature-level estimate); automated delivery tracking must query correct date field; automated release forecasting using target date ignores release-level scheduling; automated roadmap communication should use release date for customer-facing delivery promises

IDEA vs FEATURE PROMOTION WORKFLOW: Aha! ideas (from idea portal) must be explicitly promoted to features before appearing on roadmap; automated idea processing pipeline must trigger promotion step; automated assumption that idea creation creates roadmap feature creates items stuck in idea portal without engineering visibility

RATE LIMIT ENDPOINT VARIATION: Aha! rate limits vary by endpoint type (100 req/min for complex queries, 400 req/min for simple); automated bulk data retrieval must respect per-endpoint rate limits; automated bulk feature listing using complex filter endpoints may hit 100 req/min limit while simple ID lookups allow 400 req/min
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product management. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Roadmap, feature, and idea data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Product management. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Roadmap and feature data.
